title: carex hassei
intro: Carex hassei, also known as the Japanese sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Carex hassei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Carex hassei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to be used for medicinal purposes.
